      0 Scheduled

      Add Inspiration

      Import Existing Post

      Save one existing post into Inspo for later idea-to-post reuse.

      Paste one post’s text, one-post browser-capture JSON, or a LinkedIn URL plus content. URL-only LinkedIn imports stay review-needed until content is pasted.
      Paste one post and preview it before saving.

      Import All Posts

      This imports content you provide from your own browser session. StellarSync does not log into LinkedIn or store your LinkedIn password.

      1. Open your LinkedIn activity page. 2. Scroll until the posts you want are visible. 3. Export your visible LinkedIn posts locally, then import the JSON or paste TSV into StellarSync. 4. Paste the text or JSON here if you are using manual capture. 5. Parse. 6. Review detected posts. 7. Import selected.
      Use the StellarSync LinkedIn Export Helper
      Use the packaged Chrome extension if you want a clearer export workflow than pasting console code manually.
      Local helper path: stellarsync/linkedin-export-helper/
      Download LinkedIn Export Helper ZIP Open README
      Install Steps
      1. Open chrome://extensions
      2. Turn on Developer Mode
      3. Click Load unpacked
      4. Select stellarsync/linkedin-export-helper
      5. Open LinkedIn activity page
      6. Click extension
      7. Download JSON
      8. Return to StellarSync and upload JSON
      Supported Export Envelope
      source
      generated_at
      source_url
      diagnostics.cardsDetected
      diagnostics.itemsWithRawText
      items[] with post text, URL, date, metrics, and raw text
      Path A · Paste / Upload JSON
      Use this when you already have a capture JSON file or want to paste raw capture JSON directly.
      Run Capture Helper in LinkedIn Tab
      StellarSync does not automate your LinkedIn tab. The reliable path is: open the LinkedIn tab, paste the helper into that tab’s browser console, run it, then upload the downloaded JSON here.
      This script runs only in your current LinkedIn browser tab. Do not run it in Terminal.
      Step 1: Open your LinkedIn activity page in another browser tab.
      Step 2: Scroll until the posts you want are visible.
      Step 3: Open the browser console:
      Chrome/Edge: Cmd+Option+J (Mac) or Ctrl+Shift+J (Windows)
      Safari: Enable Develop menu first, then Develop → Show JavaScript Console
      Step 4: Copy the helper code below and paste it into the LinkedIn tab console.
      Step 5: Press Enter. A JSON file downloads locally.
      Step 6: Return here and upload/paste the JSON.
      Run this in the LinkedIn browser tab Console, not Terminal.
      Show full helper script
      Path C · Import Media Manifest
      Paste a media manifest JSON from the LinkedIn Export Helper to upload historic media assets to Google Drive and link them to imported posts.
      No media manifest loaded yet.
      Paste copied text from your LinkedIn activity page. This is the primary reliable import mode.
      Paste JSON from Export Helper here or upload the downloaded file, then click Parse JSON.
      Paste the JSON that the LinkedIn console helper downloaded, then click Parse JSON.
      Export Helper Detection

      Source Reference

      Keep one post focused here. Import existing posts from Write an Idea, and bulk LinkedIn history from Connected Accounts.

      If no time is chosen, StellarSync stores an internal 9:15 AM scheduled timestamp while leaving the visible time blank.

      Inline AI Assist

      Use the current post fields as context. This generates finished draft language unless you turn on outline mode.

      Publishing

      Live posting requires a connected account with publish scope. Unconnected platforms stay in StellarSync-only draft mode.

      LinkedIn Author Context
      LinkedIn validation and payload preparation results will appear here.

      Create Campaign

      Add a campaign row with a pillar, star-map shape, and archive status.

      Merging moves all posts from this campaign into the selected target campaign, then archives the source campaign.

      Add Linked Asset

      Save a Drive link, LinkedIn post URL, or direct image/video link to the Media Vault.

      Social Import Adapter

      Use Open Graph for regular articles, Instagram oEmbed when configured, or authenticated/manual fallback for social platforms.

      Manual Social Card
      Paste a URL to detect the safest import mode.

      Optional Social Card Image

      Attach an image when platform metadata is blocked or missing.

      Social Card / Source Preview

      Paste a URL to preview the detected source.

      Install StellarSync

      Use the best install flow for this device.

      StellarSync is already installed on this device.

      Desktop / Android

      Use the Install App button when it becomes available in Chrome or Edge.

      iPhone / iPad

      Open StellarSync in Safari, tap Share, then choose Add to Home Screen.

      Unsupported Browser

      If install is unavailable, open StellarSync in Safari, Chrome, or Edge and try again.

      AI Drafting Workspace

      Build reviewed drafts from notes, inspo, media, links, campaigns, or existing posts.

      Historical Post Context

      Use imported posts from `POSTS` as pattern context. Original posts are used by default unless you explicitly switch to repost analysis.

      Brand Alignment Checklist

      Generation Style

      Controls how the AI matches your historical writing patterns. Default uses the strongest detected style signals.

      Diversity Controls

      Review Status

      Draft Preview

      Generates finished draft language by default. Turn on outline mode only when you want structure instead of final copy.

      Connected Accounts

      AI Providers
      Configure API keys for AI generation. Local Creator Engine is always available.
      Import Tools
      Bring in your own visible LinkedIn posts from a local browser capture without using LinkedIn credentials.
      Export your visible LinkedIn posts locally, then import the JSON or paste TSV into StellarSync.
      Planning Behavior
      Internal scheduling uses a local-safe planning date, with 9:15 AM as the default internal time when no time is chosen.
      Internal Scheduling
      Planned in StellarSync. Live platform posting is not connected yet.
      AI Providers
      Local Creator Engine remains the default. Provider keys are stored server-side and never rendered back into the UI.
      Imported LinkedIn Rewrite
      Preview or rewrite imported LinkedIn rows directly in `POSTS`. Live apply creates a backup tab first.
